overview.description: The BondBloxx Bloomberg Five Year Target Duration US Treasury ETF (XFIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is passively managed to invest in a portfolio of US Treasury securities with a target duration of five years. XFIV was launched on Sep 13, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Treasury 5 Year Target Duration Index

data.title: ETF Edge: Managing long-term risk amid a new Fed chair nominee, jobs data and market volatility
data.text: From a new Fed chair nominee to a hard turn to risk-off trading in some parts of the market - the broader landscape is rapidly changing for ETF investors. BondBloxx ETFs co-founder Joanna Gallegos and...
